title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: The heavy snowfall made it impossible for the plane to take off.
I'm sure he didn't forget about the meeting on purpose.
questions.secondSentence: I'm sure he (1) _________ about the meeting.

questions.firstSentence: It's possible that the text message was sent by mistake.
The cost of the excursion is included in the price of the holiday.
questions.secondSentence: The price of the holiday (1) _________ the cost of the excursion.

questions.firstSentence: I would prefer you to pay in cash if possible.
As soon as he arrived, the conference began.
